schemes.benefit_en: Rs 2 lakh/year free treatment for 5 disease categories
schemes.benefit_hi: 5 रोग श्रेणियों के लिए ₹2 लाख/वर्ष मुफ्त इलाज
schemes.eligibility: Assam families (BPL: free, APL: income < Rs 5 lakh)

schemes.benefit_en: Rs 1,250/month to woman of economically poor families
1 lakh youth to get skill training + tool kit + Rs 30,000 support
schemes.benefit_hi: 1 लाख युवाओं को कौशल प्रशिक्षण + टूल किट + ₹30,000
schemes.eligibility: Assam youth aged 18-40 from poor families
